title: Extract proposal delta support from review workspace
summary: Modularize the macOS review/navigation workspace by extracting proposal apply-preview compare and delta support into a focused native source file.
acceptance_criteria: Proposal apply-preview compare and current-delta helpers move out of StudioMacReviewNavigationWorkspace.swift into a dedicated macOS source file.
The extracted code preserves truthful read-only proposal compare behavior and keeps call sites compiling without root-shell regressions.
The review workspace file becomes meaningfully smaller and its ownership around proposal delta surfaces becomes clearer.
Ticket validation, patch hygiene, repo contract validation, and a targeted HumbleStudioMac debug build pass for the slice.

evidence.note: Proposal apply-preview snapshot compare, current delta, diff-plan and repo-audit support now live in `StudioMacReviewNavigationProposalSupport.swift` instead of staying embedded inside the main review workspace file.
The extraction kept the apply-preview surface read-only and preserved compare-backed delta behavior while clarifying ownership around proposal-specific helper types.
Confirmed patch hygiene and whitespace correctness.
Repo contract still passes after the proposal support modularization.

evidence.path: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
evidence.note: Targeted HumbleStudioMac debug build succeeded after the extraction.

trigger.source_ref: Top 10 item 1 after HS-0028: split StudioMacReviewNavigationWorkspace.swift into smaller proposal/apply-preview and compare-focused macOS files.

commands: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
agent_notes: Prefer extracting proposal-specific compare and delta types first instead of mixing broader review queue responsibilities into the same slice.
Keep behavior unchanged; this is a modularization-first checkpoint.
